title: Author product-detail views for the Collections aisle
description: Author ten product-detail views — one per Collections-aisle widget — using the shared page skeleton extracted in task 14.

context.aisle_scope: Ten products: TFeatureCard, TCategoryCard, TCategoryHeader, TCategorySection, TCollectionCard, TCollectionHeader, TCollectionListItem, TCollectionSection, TCollectionToolbar, TBentoGrid.
special_attention: TBentoGrid: preview reacts to sizes list mutation, animation enum, and spacing slider. Animation enum changes must be visibly smooth.
TCollectionSection and TCategorySection: preview switches layout enum live and honours maxItems cell.
TCollectionToolbar: preview is the toolbar itself wired to the view model cells, with a small demo list below it that the toolbar filters live.
TCollectionListItem: used as the list-layout demo's item builder in its own page and also across collection section showcases.

goals: Ten product detail view files under example/lib/showcase/feature/collections/views/{widget_snake_case}_showcase/{widget_snake_case}_showcase_view.dart.
Each uses the shared page skeleton from task 14 — no duplicate scaffolding.
Each live preview binds to its view model cells via ValueListenableBuilder variants.
TBentoGrid's preview visibly reflects animation/sizes/spacing changes from its debug controls.
TCollectionSection and TCategorySection previews visibly switch layout live when the controls change.
acceptance_criteria: Opening each of the ten product detail pages renders the full page structure.
TBentoGrid debug controls live-mutate the preview.
TCollectionSection layout toggle live-swaps the visual between bento/list/grid.
TCollectionToolbar preview actually filters its demo list as the visitor interacts with the controls.
constraints: No Material chrome. Icons from LucideIcons only.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP for reading each collection widget's source.

verification_gate: Manual verification of every preview and every debug control on each of the ten pages.

quality_checklist.maintainability: Shared skeleton in use. Adding a new collection widget means a new view model + a thin view.
quality_checklist.performance: Value listener scopes tight enough that sliding a slider in one control does not rebuild the whole page.

follow_up_notes: Phase 3 task 07 created 10 product-detail view models for the Collections aisle. Summary:
1. TFeatureCardShowcaseViewModel — cells: title (String), description (String), lastTapFired (String?). Mutators: updateTitle, updateDescription, onTap.
2. TCategoryCardShowcaseViewModel — cells: title (String), lastTapFired (String?). Mutators: updateTitle, onPressed.
3. TCategoryHeaderShowcaseViewModel — cells: title (String), description (String). Mutators: updateTitle, updateDescription.
4. TCategorySectionShowcaseViewModel — cells: layout (TCategorySectionLayout), maxItems (int?), lastShowAllFired (String?). Mutators: updateLayout, updateMaxItems, onShowAll.
5. TCollectionCardShowcaseViewModel — cells: title (String), subtitle (String?), meta (String?), lastTapFired (String?). Mutators: updateTitle, updateSubtitle, updateMeta, onTap.
6. TCollectionHeaderShowcaseViewModel — cells: title (String), description (String). Mutators: updateTitle, updateDescription.
7. TCollectionListItemShowcaseViewModel — cells: title (String), subtitle (String?), meta (String?), lastTapFired (String?). Mutators: updateTitle, updateSubtitle, updateMeta, onTap.

8. TCollectionSectionShowcaseViewModel — cells: layout (TCollectionSectionLayout), bentoAnimation (TBentoGridAnimation), lastTapFired (String?). Mutators: updateLayout, updateBentoAnimation, onItemTap(int).

9. TCollectionToolbarShowcaseViewModel — cells: searchQuery (String), sortValue (String?), filterValue (String?), layout (TCollectionSectionLayout), lastCallbackFired (String?). Static: sortOptions, filterOptions. Mutators: updateSearchQuery, updateSortValue, updateFilterValue, updateLayout.

10. TBentoGridShowcaseViewModel — cells: sizes (List<double>), animation (TBentoGridAnimation), spacing (double), showAddRemoveControls (bool). Mutators: updateAnimation, updateSpacing, toggleShowAddRemoveControls, addItem(double), removeLastItem, updateItemSize(int, double).
None registered in GetIt — construct inline in TViewBuilder.
